codeReview.summary: Implementation is clean, well-documented, and follows established patterns. Schema conversion utilities correctly handle Zod schemas, raw JSON Schema, and provider-specific transformations (Google/Gemini). All 60 structured output tests pass with comprehensive coverage.

summary: PASS - The schema conversion utilities feature is complete and well-implemented. All required functionality is present: zodToJsonSchema for Zod-to-JSON-Schema conversion, normalizeJsonSchema for raw JSON Schema pass-through, stripUnsupportedFeatures for Google/Gemini compatibility (removing pattern, minLength, maxLength, min/max constraints), and convertToProviderSchema for orchestrating the conversion with optional name/description. Tests comprehensively cover primitives, objects, arrays, optionals, enums, nested structures, and Google-specific transformations. JSDoc documentation is thorough. No blocking issues found.
